rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DONALD CARMIGNANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Liens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 26, 2019 line 1. PETITIONER DONALD CARMIGNANI, 212-214 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Liens GRANTED. No opposition filed. Property is released from Mechanic's Liens recorded on October 25, 2016 and November 18, 2016 by Salas an Modirian respectively. Attorney's fees and costs are awarded as requests and shall be paid as follows: $1,117.50 by Salas and $1,117.50 by Modirian. Petitioner to prepare order in compliance with CC 8490. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE CERON ET AL VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Seeking Leave To File 4th Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 26, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT SALLY LIU, JOHN LIU Motion Seeking Leave To File 4th Amended Cross-Complaint OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1010.6 (4)(B). Based on the electronic service date of August 1, 2019 the earliest date for hearing is August 27, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant 371 Broadway Street, Llcs Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions, Set One, Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 26, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant 371 Broadway Street, Llcs Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions, Set One, Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set One GRANTED. Complete verified responses without objections shall be produced within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is granted as requested to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Valstock Ventures, Llcs Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions, Set One, Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 26, 2019 line 4. rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Valstock Management Companys Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set One
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 26, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Valstock Management Companys Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Form Interrogatories, Set One GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Objections are overruled, except for privilege objection (privilege log to be provided within 10 days of notice of entry of order) and objection regarding the definition of "Incident." (Form Interrogatory 12.1). All documents subject to this motion that have been promised to be produced are to be produced within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Motion to Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories is DENIED as to 12.1-12.7, 13.1, 13.2, 14.1, and 14.2. Motion is GRANTED as to 17.1 and 50.1-50.4. All responsive documents to be produced as stated above. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is granted as requested to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/CFH)
